prompt: A surreal scene where a single person stands alone with only a few connections, while each of those connected individuals is surrounded by large dense crowds, creating an imbalance in social connections, cinematic lighting, realistic style, slightly uncanny atmosphere, no text, no numbers, no charts, no symbols
